scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock'].forEach(f => { try { fs.unlinkSync(f); } catch {} }); const ua = process.env.npm_config_user_agent || ''; if (!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.dev: pnpm exec concurrently "cross-env PORT=8080 DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env pnpm --filter=@workspace/api-server run dev" "cross-env PORT=20118 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter=@workspace/itsm run dev"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
